samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Sift oven ingredients to 350 degrees
In a medium bowl, combine dry ingredients; add eggs, milk oil and vanilla. Mix well
Add boiling ingredients to dry ingredients and mix well
For each cup of batter, pour 1/3 cup batter and a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan
Bake for 350 for 25 minutes or until toothpick inserted in toothpick comes out clean
Cool for 10 minutes
Remove to wire rack and cool completely
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. Sift oven ingredients to 350 degrees
2. In a medium bowl, combine dry ingredients; add eggs, milk oil and vanilla. Mix well
3. Add boiling ingredients to dry ingredients and mix well
4. For each cup of batter, pour 1/3 cup batter and a greased 13 x 9 x 2 inch pan
5. Bake for 350 for 25 minutes or until toothpick inserted in toothpick comes out clean
6. Cool for 10 minutes
7. Remove to wire rack and cool completely

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In a, mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa, baking soda and salt
In a separate bowl, combine eggs, milk and vanilla
Add pour wet and ingredients into dry ingredients
Stir until just combined
Spoon into greased 9-. square pan
Bake 350 for 35>40 minutes

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In oven large pan
In large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt
In eggs add milk, oil and vanilla and beat
Add to dry ingredients and mix well
Beat well
Stir and add water
Pour into greased and floured baking pan
Bake for 350 for 30 minutes
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

- salt

Instructions:

4. Add to dry ingredients and mix well
5. Beat well
6. Stir and add water
7. Pour into greased and floured baking pan

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: Combine the dry ingredients the dry ingredients except the vanilla. Add the eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Mix until smooth
Pour in an 8x8 pan
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes
Frost with your favorite icing and serve warm
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:

2. Mix until smooth
3. Pour in an 8x8 pan
4. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes
5. Frost with your favorite icing and serve warm

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In the bowl bowl you want the cake
In a large bowl mix the first five ingredients
In a medium bowl mix the eggs, milk, oil and vanilla
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and stir till just combined
Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9 x 13 pan
Bake at 350 degrees for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick comes out clean and comes out clean
Remove from oven and cool on racks

samples.title: Chocolate Cake
steps: In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt;
mix a well in the center
In a small, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla;
stir into the well ingredients and stir just until moistened
Pour
into a greased 9-in square baking pan
at 350 for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean
Cool 10 minutes before removing from the pan
samples.formatted:
Chocolate Cake

Ingredients:
- flour
- sugar
- cocoa powder
- baking soda
- salt
- eggs
- milk
- vegetable oil
- vanilla
- boiling water

Instructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking soda and salt;
2. mix a well in the center
3. In a small, combine eggs, milk, oil and vanilla;
4. stir into the well ingredients and stir just until moistened
5. Pour
6. into a greased 9-in square baking pan
7. at 350 for 35-40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted near the center comes out clean
8. Cool 10 minutes before removing from the pan
